title: Peter Pauper Press Dinosaur World 1000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzle, Green, Medium
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Be challenged for hours by this complex puzzle, featuring fearsome dinosaurs, large and small, in a primeval landscape!
1000 precision-cut pieces fit snugly. Vibrant high-resolution image.
Linen-textured surface reduces glare. Durable premium blue puzzle board. Full-sized, full-color poster of finished puzzle included for reference.
Finished puzzle measures 28'' wide x 20'' high. Sturdy puzzle box measures 9-1/4'' square x 2.5'' deep.
Warning: Choking hazard. small parts. Not for children under 3 years.
description: From the manufacturer Dinosaur World Be challenged for hours by this complex puzzle! Complete a dramatic picture of fearsome dinosaurs in a primeval landscape! We use premium European blue puzzle board Peter Pauper Press puzzles are produced with the highest quality solid European blue board. Blue board won’t peel, even after years of use. Pieces fit together securely. Puzzles have 1000 pieces—a classic jigsaw challenge! Finished puzzle measures 28'' wide x 20'' high. Linen-textured surface reduces glare Subtle texture means less puzzle glare. Images remain sharp and vibrant. Pieces interlock fluidly. Easy-touch linen finish makes putting puzzles together a pleasure. Bonus poster included! A full-sized, full-color poster of the finished puzzle is included. Use it for reference (and inspiration!) as you solve your puzzle. Keep it next to your puzzle pieces or hang nearby. Experts say puzzles offer many benefits Improve memory, mood, and more! Putting puzzles together boosts short-term memory as you recall colors, shapes, and the overall image you're working on. Your mood improves and you experience a sense of accomplishment when you complete a puzzle—or even get two pieces together! Eye-hand coordination and attention to detail are improved as you search for matching pieces. And as you unwind with a puzzle, your subconscious is free to work out other challenges in your life. Other benefits include keeping your brain active, relieving stress, even increasing I.Q.! Hours of fun 1000-piece puzzles challenge and entertain! Test your puzzle skills alone or with friends and family. The benefits of working puzzles apply to all age levels. Escape the digital world Relax and enjoy a little screen-free time, whether alone or with others. No technology needed. A colorful, dramatic puzzle image awaits you! About our Dinosaur World Jigsaw Puzzle: 1000 precision-cut pieces fit snugly. Vibrant high-resolution image Premium European blue puzzle board. Linen-textured surface reduces glare. Full-size, full-color poster of finished puzzle included for reference. Box measures 9-1/4'' square x 2'' deep. Finished puzzle measures 28'' wide x 20'' high. Warning: Choking hazard—small parts. Not for children under 3 years. Peter—and later, his wife, Edna—sought to create fine books that sold at ''prices even a pauper could afford.'' Today, still family owned and operated, Peter Pauper Press continues to honor our founders’ legacy—and our customers’ expectations—of beauty, quality, and value. Image: Peter Pauper Press headquarters, circa 1948.
